title: Mining in the Courts, Vol. XIII
content:
## Mining in the Courts, Vol. XIII
The 13 th annual edition of Mining in the Courts provides a one-stop annual update on legal developments impacting the mining industry. In addition to providing summaries of many of the most important cases, this edition contains articles with our insights on current legal trends and what we think the industry can expect to face in the coming year.
Topics covered in this edition include:
- Bankruptcy and Insolvency;
- Labour and Employment;
- Securities and Shareholder Disputes;
- Surface Rights and Access to Minerals;
McCarthy Tétrault’s mining litigators offer strategic approaches and innovative strategies to resolve complex disputes, including through mediation, arbitration and litigation. They offer world-class experience and have expertise in the full range of issues that affect mining clients, including property ownership and construction concerns, environmental matters, Aboriginal issues and the interpretation of mining agreements. The Global Mining Litigation Group draws from one of Canada’s largest and longest-standing litigation practices, involved in some of the most high-profile, precedent-setting cases in Canadian legal history.
Special thanks to the following students for their assistance on the publication: Derek Baker , Sam Bhattacharjee, Melissa Berdjani, Sarah Bussin, Katelyn Cooper , Will Dandie , Juliette Despatie, Michelle de Haas , Micky Hoskin , Milica Pavlovic , Patrick Sheppard , and Matthew Yensen .
Previous editions of Mining in the Courts .

### Mining in the Courts, Vol. XIII
Welcome to the 13th annual edition of Mining in the Courts, a publication of McCarthy Tétrault LLP’s Mining Litigation Group that provides a one-stop annual update on legal developments impacting the mining industry.
